hooks.command: echo '=== LOOM: Loading Canonical Memory ===' && infynon loom retrieve --layer canonical 2>/dev/null || echo '[loom] Not initialized. Run: infynon loom init --repo <name> --owner <team> --user <you>' && echo '---' && echo '[loom-hook] Canonical memory loaded. Ask user: "Would you like to load team memory for this session?" If yes, run: infynon loom retrieve --layer team'

echo '[loom-hook] Session ending. Remind user: "Any observations worth saving? I can create team/user notes and run compaction." If user agrees, create notes with infynon loom note add, then run: infynon loom compact'
